text.title: Bug Pattern to Lint Rule Conversion Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a candidate cluster by recurrence → detector feasibility → false-positive rate. Branches name observable inputs; leaves reference rules.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: lint infra present, owner assignable, sample code available?

branch.question: Is detector.kind ∈ {ruff, eslint, regex, ast-visitor, test-name, shellcheck, custom} AND a draft compiles + matches the bad sample?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → cluster_size_30d=4 ≥ 3 → detector kind=ruff T201 matches sample → fp_rate_pct=1.3 ≤ 5 → verdict=record-and-wire (ref run-the-checklist).
